# `isNull` Function

Check if a value is null

Returns true if the given value is null, false otherwise.

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
isNull(input dynamic) bool
```

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `input` (Dynamic, Nullable) The value to check for null.

## Example Usage

```console
> provider::util::isNull(null)
true

> provider::util::isNull("hello")
false

> provider::util::isNull("")
false

> provider::util::isNull(0)
false
```

```terraform
output "null_value" {
  value = provider::util::isNull(null)
  # Returns: true
}

output "non_null_value" {
  value = provider::util::isNull("hello")
  # Returns: false
}
```
